signals.headline: Ethereum price surges 14% over past week amid geopolitical de-escalation, boosting Polymarket odds to 56% YES for $4,000
signals.raw:
Ethereum price surges 14% over past week amid geopolitical de-escalation, boosting Polymarket odds to 56% YES for $4,000 by April end | YES | MED confidence** [2]

Ethereum's price jumped from $2,343.40 on April 16 to $2,358.26 on April 17 (Eastern Time), reflecting a modest daily gain amid a broader 14% weekly rally[1][2][3]. This movement, tied to de-escalation signals in Trump-Iran tensions and
matched_markets: Will Jared Kushner have a diplomatic meeting with Iran by April 30?
Will Trump’s approval rating be between 39.0 and 39.4 on April 24, 2026?
Ethereum Up or Down - April 18, 6:20PM-6:25PM ET
